name: Tides
description: Tidal modulator producing four phase-shifted slope segments. Operates as VCO, LFO, complex envelope, or tap-tempo LFO. Four simultaneous outputs at quadrature offsets.

controls.name: Frequency
controls.description: Coarse frequency control. Range shifts by octaves across the three range modes.
controls.detail: VCO: ~C0–C7 · LFO: ~32s–100Hz · AD/AR: full envelope window

controls.name: Shape
controls.description: Morphs slope shape from exponential through linear to logarithmic.
controls.detail: CCW: expo (percussive) · noon: linear · CW: log (plucked) · bipolar CV via attenuverter

controls.name: Slope
controls.description: Asymmetry between rising and falling segments.
controls.detail: CCW: fast attack / slow decay · noon: symmetric · CW: slow attack / fast decay

controls.name: Smoothness
controls.description: CCW applies wavefolding; CW applies low-pass smoothing. Drastically reshapes spectrum.
controls.detail: CCW: wavefolded harmonics · noon: raw · CW: LPF smoothing down to sine

controls.name: Range Button
controls.description: Cycles output range: high (VCO/audio), middle (LFO), low (AD/AR envelope).
controls.detail: LED color indicates range · long press toggles tap-tempo mode

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Cycles output mode: AD/AR envelope, Loop/Oscillator, Self-triggering.
controls.detail: In AD: TRIG required · in Loop: free-running · hold for alt-mode menu

controls.name: Output Mode Button
controls.detail: Amplitude-offset (accent layers) · Parallel quadrature (0/90/180/270) · Frequency-shifted ratios · Four-voice ratios

controls.name: Frequency CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the FM CV input. V/OCT jack is always 1V/oct and unattenuated.

controls.name: Shape Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SHAPE CV input.

controls.name: Slope Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SLOPE CV input.

controls.name: Smoothness Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the SMOOTHNESS CV input.

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Hard-sync in oscillator modes; retrigger in AD/AR; tap-in in tap-tempo mode.

inputs.name: FREQ CV
inputs.description: Frequency modulation. Scaled by FM attenuverter.

inputs.name: SHAPE CV
inputs.description: Shape modulation scaled by its attenuverter.

inputs.name: SLOPE CV
inputs.description: Slope modulation scaled by its attenuverter.

inputs.name: SMOOTH CV
inputs.description: Smoothness modulation scaled by its attenuverter.

inputs.name: LEVEL/CLOCK
inputs.description: PWM-style level CV in oscillator modes; external clock source in tap-tempo mode; amplitude VCA in envelope modes.

outputs.name: OUT 1
outputs.description: First slope output. Reference phase in quadrature mode.

outputs.name: OUT 2
outputs.description: Second slope. 90° phase in quadrature mode; second harmonic in frequency-shifted mode.

outputs.name: OUT 3
outputs.description: Third slope. 180° phase in quadrature; third voice in polyphonic mode.

outputs.name: OUT 4
outputs.description: Fourth slope. 270° phase in quadrature; fourth voice or accent sum in amplitude mode.

behaviors.name: AD/AR envelope mode
behaviors.trigger: low-range selected + AD or AR mode
behaviors.description: TRIG fires a complex envelope. AD: attack then decay, retriggerable. AR: sustains while gate held, releases on fall. SHAPE morphs curve; SLOPE ratios attack/decay; SMOOTHNESS shapes the knee.

behaviors.name: Oscillator mode
behaviors.description: Full-bandwidth cyclic slope generator tracking V/OCT. SMOOTHNESS CCW folds the waveform; CW smooths to pure sine. Acts as sine/triangle/saw/folded hybrid oscillator with independent slope controls.

behaviors.name: Quadrature LFO output mode
behaviors.description: OUT 1–4 emit the same wave phase-shifted 0°/90°/180°/270°. Useful for 4-channel panning, vector-synthesis style motion, and generating independent-looking modulations from one source.

behaviors.name: Frequency-ratio polyphonic mode
behaviors.description: OUT 1–4 run at harmonically related multiples of the base frequency. Generates instant harmonic series or drone partials from a single pitch source.

behaviors.name: Amplitude-offset accent mode
behaviors.description: OUT 1–4 emit the same envelope at successively scaled amplitudes — patch into stacked VCAs for built-in accent layers or velocity-like drum dynamics.

behaviors.name: Tap-tempo LFO
behaviors.description: Rate is set by taps on TRIG rather than by the Frequency knob. Synchronizes LFO motion to an external clock or performance tap.

behaviors.name: Self-triggering (looping envelope)
behaviors.description: Envelope retriggers at end of fall creating a cyclic AD LFO whose timing responds to SLOPE/SMOOTHNESS CV. In low range this gives long-form evolving envelopes; in high range it becomes an audio waveform.

behaviors.name: Hard sync (TRIG in oscillator mode)
behaviors.description: TRIG edges reset oscillator phase, enabling classic hard-sync sounds when driven by an external sub-octave or sequenced reset source.

behaviors.name: LEVEL as VCA
behaviors.trigger: CV patched into LEVEL/CLOCK + envelope or oscillator mode
behaviors.description: LEVEL input amplitude-modulates all four outputs simultaneously. Doubles as internal VCA — send an envelope here for a single-module tone-plus-amplitude voice.

behaviors.name: Harmonic Oscillator (alt mode)
behaviors.description: Firmware 2 exposes a harmonic oscillator mode where the four outputs emit a fundamental and three harmonics. Shape controls harmonic balance. Strong source for additive drones.

behaviors.name: Sheep-style wavetable (alt mode)
behaviors.description: Tides 2 inherits the Sheep wavetable oscillator. Turns the module into a 4-output wavetable VCO navigable with Shape/Slope/Smoothness.

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature stereo panner
patchIdeas.patch: Tides in LFO range · Output Mode: quadrature · OUT 1 and OUT 3 (opposite phase) into L/R VCA CVs for cyclic auto-pan · OUT 2 into filter cutoff for swept motion correlated but phase-shifted
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: LFO
* Output Mode: Quadrature

- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCA L (CV)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> VCA R (CV) // 180° opposite
- Tides (OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA L (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA R (In)

patchIdeas.name: Complete percussive voice (AD + VCA + tone)
patchIdeas.patch: Tides in AD envelope mode · SHAPE full CCW (expo) · SLOPE 10 o'clock (snappy) · OUT 1 shaping VCA · OUT 2 into filter cutoff for per-hit brightness · clock triggers TRIG · single module delivers envelope-plus-tone percussion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: Low
* Mode: AD
* Output Mode: Amplitude-offset

- Clock (Out) t> Tides (TRIG)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Four-voice harmonic drone
patchIdeas.patch: Tides in VCO range · Output Mode: frequency-shifted · SMOOTHNESS full CW (sines) · four outputs mixed produce instant harmonic series · slow LFO on SHAPE gently morphs waveshape across all partials simultaneously
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: VCO
* Output Mode: Frequency-shifted
* Smoothness: CW (sine)

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- LFO (Out) >> Tides (SHAPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Mixer (In 1) // fundamental
- Tides (OUT 2) -> Mixer (In 2) // 2nd harmonic
- Tides (OUT 3) -> Mixer (In 3) // 3rd harmonic
- Tides (OUT 4) -> Mixer (In 4) // 4th harmonic
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Tap-tempo synced LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Long-press Range to enter tap-tempo mode · clock from Pam's or master clock into TRIG sets LFO rate · OUT 1 modulates filter cutoff · OUT 2 (quadrature) modulates pan · LFO stays locked to song tempo
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: LFO (tap-tempo)
* Output Mode: Quadrature

- Clock (Out) c> Tides (TRIG) // tap rate
- Tides (OUT 1) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> VCA Pan (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Stacked accent drum envelopes
patchIdeas.patch: Output Mode: amplitude-offset · AD mode · TRIG from drum clock · OUT 1 drives kick VCA · OUT 2 drives snare VCA · OUT 3 drives hat VCA · OUT 4 sums the accent layer · one envelope source delivers four velocity-scaled drum layers
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Mode: AD
* Output Mode: Amplitude-offset

- Clock (Out) t> Tides (TRIG)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> Kick VCA (CV)
- Tides (OUT 2) >> Snare VCA (CV)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> Hat VCA (CV)
- Tides (OUT 4) >> Accent VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Self-triggering complex LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: self-triggering · Range: LFO · SLOPE CV modulated by slow random source for irregular phrasing · OUT 1 modulates VCO FM · OUT 3 (phase-shifted) modulates filter · self-generating evolving modulation without external clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: LFO
* Mode: Self-triggering

- S&H (Out) >> Tides (SLOPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) >> VCO (FM)
- Tides (OUT 3) >> Filter (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Folded bass VCO
patchIdeas.patch: Range: VCO · Mode: Oscillator · SMOOTHNESS full CCW (wavefolded harmonics) · V/OCT from sequencer · SHAPE CV from envelope adds dynamic expo saturation · OUT 1 into filter for classic waveshaped bass with evolving folds
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: VCO
* Mode: Oscillator
* Smoothness: CCW (wavefold)

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- Envelope (Out) >> Tides (SHAPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Hard-sync lead
patchIdeas.patch: Range: VCO · Oscillator mode · external sub VCO at fixed pitch into TRIG forces phase reset · V/OCT sweeps freely · SMOOTHNESS at noon · SHAPE CV from envelope · classic aggressive sync-lead timbre
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tides:
* Range: VCO
* Mode: Oscillator

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Tides (V/OCT)
- Sub VCO (Out) t> Tides (TRIG) // hard sync
- Envelope (Out) >> Tides (SHAPE CV)
- Tides (OUT 1) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
